Contact.metaDescription: Write for a confidential first exchange on a mandate.
Contact.title: Contact
Contact.intro: No commercial qualification. State the context; we respond appropriately.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messageHint: A few lines are enough. No sensitive personal data at this stage.
Contact.consentRich: I accept that my information is used to respond to my request, as described in the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
Contact.consentError: Please accept the terms to send the message.
Contact.success: Message received. We will respond according to context.
Contact.error: Sending failed. Retry or write from your professional email.

validation.name: Please provide your name.
validation.email: Please provide a valid email address.
validation.messageShort: The message is too short to be useful.

Contact.note: Processing limited to responding to your request. No advertising profiling.
